title: Po_core semantic_jump_human_review_request v1
description: PR-018 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Converts a SemanticFrameProposal (PR-017) into a human-reviewable review REQUEST -- it never executes a semantic jump. semantic_frame_changed, content_rewrite_applied, state_mutation_applied, safety_bypass_applied, trace_reset_applied, and semantic_jump_executed are all const false: this is human-review-gate only (read / verify / request_review / trace / validate). See docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_JUMP_HUMAN_REVIEW_GATE_V1.md.

semantic_frame_proposal_id.description: The semantic_frame_proposal (PR-017) this review request was generated from.

review_status.description: PR-018 seed runtime only ever produces 'required' when a review request is generated by SemanticJumpHumanReviewGate.require_review().

review_required.description: Every review request requires human review before any future jump execution. Always true.

execution_mode.description: Fixed mode marker: this gate only ever requests and records human review, never executes anything.

semantic_frame_changed.description: This PR never changes the semantic frame. Always false.

content_rewrite_applied.description: This request never rewrites content. Always false.

state_mutation_applied.description: This request never mutates runtime state. Always false.

safety_bypass_applied.description: This request never bypasses a safety gate. Always false.

trace_reset_applied.description: This request never resets or deletes trace. Always false.

semantic_jump_executed.description: This PR never executes a semantic jump, even if a later decision is approved. Always false.

original_semantic_step_hashes.description: Inherited verbatim from semantic_frame_proposal.original_semantic_step_hashes. Key: step_id. Value: SHA-256 hex digest.

source_trace_refs.description: Must include a SemanticJumpFrameProposed (or SemanticJumpPlanned) event id, directly or via ancestry.

safety_constraints.description: PR-018 seed runtime always sets every field true.

trace_refs.description: Must resolve to a SemanticJumpFrameProposed event, directly or via ancestry -- enforced by TraceContinuityValidator, not expressible in JSON Schema.
